plans.name: SSE event types, broadcast channel, and /v1/events endpoint

tasks.name: Add workspace dependencies and create SseEvent types + SSE handler
Extend AppState with broadcast channel and register SSE route

plans.name: File watcher module with debounce, sync triggering, and SSE event emission

tasks.name: Create watcher module with FileDebouncer, spawn_watcher, and watcher_loop
Wire watcher into serve.rs and update main.rs with projects_dir parameter

patterns.name: Three-crate Cargo workspace
patterns.description: Dependencies flow core->store->server. Workspace deps at root, consumed via { workspace = true }.

patterns.name: Server crate is binary-only
patterns.description: Server crate produces binary via [[bin]] section. No lib.rs — module declarations in main.rs.

patterns.name: WAL mode + tokio-rusqlite async wrapper
patterns.description: Database uses WAL mode with 5s busy_timeout. tokio-rusqlite Connection is Arc-based and Clone. conn.call() for sync rusqlite ops.

patterns.name: Incremental byte-offset sync
patterns.description: sync_file reads from stored byte offset, returns records_synced count. Per-batch transactions with atomic sync_metadata updates.

patterns.name: extract_session_id from file paths
patterns.description: Handles main session files (UUID filename stem) and subagent files (parent of subagents dir). Path component traversal.

patterns.name: clap derive CLI with #[tokio::main]
patterns.description: Subcommand enum with clap derive. tracing-subscriber for logging. ExitCode return type.

patterns.name: Path resolution: CLI arg > env > HOME default
patterns.description: resolve_db_path and resolve_projects_dir follow this pattern consistently.

patterns.name: Session upsert INSERT OR IGNORE first-seen
patterns.description: First record creates session row, subsequent records are no-ops. Version field reflects first-seen value.
